## ERT1.2. En route capacity incentive scheme {#ert1.2.-en-route-capacity-incentive-scheme .Heading-2-ER}

The Swedish NSA reports a financial bonus for the ANSP of SEK 16 932 176 for en route capacity performance in 2025.

A local incentive target was set at 0.18 min/flight, for all causes of delay, and an actual value of 0.022 mins/flight was achieved.
